headline: A Look At Prudential Financial (PRU) Valuation After Q1 2026 Earnings Beat And Ongoing Japan Sales Suspension
summary: Prudential Financial (PRU) reported first quarter 2026 results that topped earnings and revenue expectations, while an extended sales suspension in Japan and related charges kept pressure on overall profitability and sentiment toward the stock. See our latest analysis for Prudential Financial. At a share price of US$100.16, Prudential Financial has seen short term share price strength, with a 7-day share price return of 3.9%. However, year-to-date share price performance remains weaker, while...
